title: budget comment 'within PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS' is factually wrong
description:
In wallet/tests/e2e_testnet.rs line 429 (the receive-side mine-wait block), the comment reads:

  // Budget: mine-wait ≤ 300 s, scan ≤ 120 s; together 420 s within PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS.

This is factually incorrect. The mine-wait and scan timeouts are NOT within PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS. PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS (600s) wraps only the send_payment() call (lines 395-410). The mine-wait (Duration::from_secs(300)) and scan timeout (Duration::from_secs(120)) are applied AFTER send_payment returns, in separate tokio::time::timeout() calls. Total maximum test runtime is 600 + 300 + 120 = 1020 seconds (17 minutes), not 600 seconds.

The nie-8lcm.1 debug_assert suggestion (assert mine_wait + scan < PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS) would assert a false invariant and would fail if implemented literally since 300 + 120 = 420 < 600, but the assertion is based on the wrong premise that all three timeouts are sequential within one outer envelope. They are not — they are three independent sequential timeouts.

The correct comment should say something like: 'mine-wait ≤ 300 s + scan ≤ 120 s after send_payment (≤ 600 s); total worst-case ≤ 1020 s'.
